summary: Excellent soundboard captures a strong outdoor December show with a rocking second set.
review: The recording is praised as a very high‑quality soundboard, delivering clear and crisp audio. The concert itself is described as a strong set with the second set “rocking hard,” reflecting an energetic performance on a chilly December evening.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review highlights both superb soundboard quality and an exciting second set, indicating a top‑tier show and recording despite the limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes very high‑quality soundboard with clear, crisp audio throughout.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong overall set; second set especially energetic and memorable.
